title: kohleria rhodomallos
intro: Kohleria rhodomallos, also known as the "lipstick plant", is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae, characterized by its vibrant red and white bracts and a compact growth habit. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Kohleria rhodomallos are said to include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Kohleria rhodomallos typically involve infusions or decoctions of the plant's leaves and stems, which can be consumed as teas or used as topical applications.
